terracotta-client.permissions.newAppConn: %1$s would like permission to use the above abilities
terracotta-client.permissions.knownAppCo: %1$s has connected to Minecraft with the above abilities
terracotta-client.permissions.indefinite: It will retain access to these abilities §e%1$s§r unless you revoke them.
terracotta-client.permissions.alreadyDen: App has already been denied authentication.
terracotta-client.permissions.apiNotStar: Terracotta API has not started yet.
terracotta-client.permissions.appRemoved: Removed all permissions from %1$s. It may re-request these permissions.
terracotta-client.permissions.removeConf:
Clicking 'Remove App' will permanently revoke all permissions previously granted to %1$s and disconnect it.

It will be able to re-request these permissions, but you will have to manually authorize it again before it can connect.
terracotta-client.permissions.info.title: Information for %1$s
[ Click here to manage app permissions ]
terracotta-client.config.title: Terracotta Client Configuration
terracotta-client.config.value.api_enabl:
Allow external applications to
connect to Terracotta Client

Turning this off will disconnect all
currently connected applications.
terracotta-client.config.value.highlight:
Display a blue outline around
Library Items to show they are
being edited
terracotta-client.config.value.connectio:
The type of message (if any) to
send in chat when a known app
connects to Terracotta Client

§eVerbose:§r Displays the connecting
app's abilities in chat and provides
a button to manage its permissions

§eMinimal:§r Just sends a notice that
the app connected in chat, includes
no further information beyond the
app's name

§eNone:§r Does not send a notification
when known apps connect
